name: Recomposition · Phase 1 · Week 2 (Volume + Run Base 1)
author: Coach (Claude)
notes: No CSV export since Apr 15 — all weights held flat (can't progress without data). HRV trending low this week (16–22 ms); watch for fatigue but no volume cut yet. Export workout_data.csv after each session so next week's progression can be calculated. Running protocol unchanged — Base 1 walk-jog. Monday (Upper Push) already completed.

1.name: Upper Push
1.note: Already completed today (Mon May 11). Face pulls first to pre-activate rear delts.

2.name: Lower Hinge (posterior chain)
2.note: Priority day for hamstrings + glutes. Slow eccentric on RDL and leg curl. Strong hamstrings = better running gait + injury insurance.

exercises.note: Unilateral — match reps per side, address asymmetry
Full ROM, slow eccentric — calves matter for running

3.name: Run · Base 1 (walk-jog intervals)
3.note: Structure: 5 min brisk walk warmup → 6 rounds of (1 min easy jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min walk cooldown = 35 min. HR target Z2 (~120–140 bpm). Treadmill or track only. Cushioned shoes mandatory. Stop for sharp knee/shin/achilles pain. Log duration + kcal + any pain notes.

4.name: Upper Pull
4.note: Rear-delt volume day. Match leading hand on pull-ups — trap asymmetry should normalize now boxing is gone. ≥9 rear-delt sets this week total.

exercises.note: If < 5 reps per set, use assisted
Asymmetry priority — match reps per side

5.name: Lower Squat (quads — moderated)
5.note: 10-min bike warmup first. Knees share load with 2 run days — watch for accumulated fatigue by Friday. If knees feel beat up, drop to 3 sets of pendulum squat and skip leg extension.

exercises.note: 3 sets — running shares the knee bucket
Second hamstring dose — supports running gait

6.name: Run · Base 1 (second walk-jog) + light carries
6.note: SECOND run only if Wed felt fine — no joint flags. 30 min: 5 min walk → 5 rounds (1 min jog / 4 min walk) → 5 min cooldown. Optional: 15 min farmers carry (3 × 30m moderate load) ONLY if no knee/ankle complaints from the run. Log run + carries separately. Hip flexor protocol mandatory after.

7.name: Rest / hip flexor + ankle protocol
7.note: Mandatory mobility: 90/90, kneeling stretch, couch stretch, propped butterfly + ankle CARs and calf stretches. 15 min. Optional: easy 30 min walk. Export workout_data.csv today so Coach has data next Sunday.
